description: You are a controls engineer configuring a high-speed Carton Packer's HMI in Red Lion Crimson 3.0. Configure 3 PackML state-tracking tags for the 'Packer' equipment using Multi-State formatting to map raw PLC integer values to the standardized human-readable strings. Use the 'packml_tag_register.csv' and 'omac_state_model.txt' files in the 'CrimsonTasks' folder on the Desktop to identify the correct tags and their corresponding integer-to-string mappings. Ensure casing matches the reference document exactly and exclude any tags assigned to the 'Palletizer'. Save the project as 'packaging_packml.c3' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\. Login credentials: Docker / GymAnything123!

metadata.occupation: Packaging and Filling Machine Operators and Tenders
